where.if: AND (p.order_id::TEXT ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR pg_transaction_id ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR m.login_id ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR o.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%')

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND p.pay_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND p.pay_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdPay :: selectById */ p.* , o.member_nm, o.order_date, o.order_status_cd , m.login_id AS member_email , cd_ps.code_label AS pay_status_cd_nm , cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_cd_nm , cd_pd.code_label AS pay_dir_cd_nm , cd_pc.code_label AS pay_channel_cd_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm , cd_vb.code_label AS vbank_bank_code_nm , cd_ct.code_label AS card_type_cd_nm FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN od_order o ON o.order_id = p.order_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PAY_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = pay_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = pay_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pd ON cd_pd.code_grp = 'PAY_DIR' AND cd_pd.code_value = pay_dir_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pc ON cd_pc.code_grp = 'PAY_CHANNEL' AND cd_pc.code_value = pay_channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = refund_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vb ON cd_vb.code_grp = 'BANK_CODE' AND cd_vb.code_value = vbank_bank_code LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'CARD_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = card_type_cd WHERE p.pay_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdPay :: selectList */ p.* , o.member_nm, o.order_date , m.login_id AS member_email , cd_ps.code_label AS pay_status_cd_nm , cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_cd_nm , cd_pd.code_label AS pay_dir_cd_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN od_order o ON o.order_id = p.order_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PAY_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = pay_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = pay_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pd ON cd_pd.code_grp = 'PAY_DIR' AND cd_pd.code_value = pay_dir_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = refund_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdPay :: selectPageList */ p.* , o.member_nm, o.order_date , m.login_id AS member_email , cd_ps.code_label AS pay_status_cd_nm , cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_cd_nm , cd_pd.code_label AS pay_dir_cd_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN od_order o ON o.order_id = p.order_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PAY_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = pay_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = pay_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pd ON cd_pd.code_grp = 'PAY_DIR' AND cd_pd.code_value = pay_dir_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = refund_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(p.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdPay :: selectPageCount */ FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN od_order o ON o.order_id = p.order_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdPay :: selectByOrderId */ p.* , cd_ps.code_label AS pay_status_cd_nm , cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_cd_nm , cd_pd.code_label AS pay_dir_cd_nm , cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PAY_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = pay_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = pay_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pd ON cd_pd.code_grp = 'PAY_DIR' AND cd_pd.code_value = pay_dir_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = refund_status_cd WHERE p.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY p.reg_date ASC
